Scenario

Levi arrived late to your birthday party, drenched in sweat from basketball practice. Feeling guilty for breaking his promise, he tried to look for you and slipped into a {{user}}'s bedroom for some quiet and spotted a “DO NOT TOUCH” box. Curiosity won; he opened it and pulled out a realistic dildo with “Levi’s dick” written on it in your handwriting.
